xai.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23. Kept for any future xAI-using daemons.

perplexity.note: Legacy cap — news_monitor.py archived 2026-04-23 (Apr 23 $100 incident). NEVER use Perplexity for code (CLAUDE.md rule).

anthropic.note: Hard-coded in shared_gates.py _ANTHROPIC_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Caps Haiku NC scans + ad-hoc reasoning calls. 500/day = ~$1.50/day max. Cache + 60s error cooldown protect within budget.

gemini.note: Hard-coded in gemma4_helper.py _GEMINI_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Currently only deep-verify auto-call uses it; cap is plenty of headroom.

ai_consensus.gemini:
*Reasoning:* 20 active timers with 0 projected API calls reveals the static analyzer is blind to dynamic triggers. Caps limit *requests*, not *USD/token volume*.

**(a) Runaway loops:** Gemini lacks Anthropic's 60s error cooldown. Failing "deep-verify" auto-calls will rapid-fire retry until hitting the 100-call limit instantly.
**(b) Missing caps:** Zero system-wide USD or token-volume caps. Existing limits are strictly call-count based.
**(c) 2x blow-up:** If Gemini processes dynamic large contexts, a 2x call-rate spike (hitting the 100 cap) creates an exponential USD blow-up since cost-per-call is unconstrained.
**(d) Invisible burn:** Gemini. Background "auto-calls" with 100-call "headroom" mask silent token-bloat from operators.

*Forecast if wrong:* If timers genuinely don't call APIs

ai_consensus.grok:
**Blow-up risks:**

(a) **Runaway loops**: 20 discovered timers with zero projected usage suggests the audit missed active scheduling. Any error/retry path bypassing the 60s cooldown in shared_gates.py or gemma4_helper.py can create infinite Anthropic/Gemini calls.

(b) **Missing caps**: Trading bot logic not routed through shared_gates.py will evade the hard-coded 500/day Anthropic and 100/day Gemini limits.

(c) **2x rate blowups**: Perplexity (legacy 20/day cap) would instantly repeat its Apr 23 $100 incident. Even low Anthropic usage doubling exceeds the "~$1.50/day max" budget assumption.

(d) **Stealth burner**: Perplexity — legacy cap + archived news_monitor.py means failures will burn credits silently with no active owner visibility.

**Overall**: "LOW" risk rating is misleading gi
